flavourText: A selectively permeable villain who only lets the wrong answers through. Show it your osmosis skills and burst its bubble!
This boss has got guts (literally). Take it apart tissue by tissue and prove you know your organs inside out!
A shape-shifting super-pathogen that thinks it is unstoppable. Time to vaccinate yourself with knowledge and wipe it out!
Powered by sunlight and fuelled by glucose, this photosynthetic powerhouse will not go down without a fight. Cut off its light supply!
Always trying to keep things balanced, but you are about to throw it off. Master the feedback loops and take control!
Wrapped in strands of DNA and armed with dominant alleles. Crack the genetic code and this beast will unravel!
Top of every food chain and king of the ecosystem. Knock it off its trophic level with your ecological expertise!
Dense, positively charged, and surrounded by a cloud of electron minions. Strip away the shells and defeat the core!
Held together by powerful electrostatic forces and a giant lattice army. Break the bonds and shatter its structure!
6.02 x 10^23 reasons to be afraid. But get your calculations right and this colossal creature crumbles to nothing!
Low pH and high danger. Neutralise this corrosive villain with the perfect base and watch it fizz into defeat!
Faster than you think and always lowering the bar. Outsmart the activation energy and slow this speedster down!
This fiery fiend releases energy with every move and gets hotter by the second. Break its bonds and cool it down!
An invisible imposter hiding in every mixture. Light a flame, run the tests, and expose its true identity!
Built from corroded iron and reinforced with alloys. Assess its life cycle, find the weakness, and reduce it to rubble!
Born from greenhouse gases and pollution, this atmospheric abomination is heating up. Cool it down with the facts!
It wastes energy everywhere it goes and thinks efficiency is a myth. Prove it wrong and reclaim every lost joule!
A short-circuiting menace that loves to trip fuses and blow bulbs. Wire up your knowledge and resist its attacks!
Solid one moment, gas the next. This shape-shifting fiend changes state at will. Pin it down with particle theory!
It decays but never truly dies, splitting into new forms with every half-life. Write the nuclear equations and finish it off!
It defies every law of motion and laughs at friction. Apply the right force in the right direction and send it flying!
Invisible across most wavelengths and travelling at the speed of light. Tune in to the right frequency and expose it!
Surrounded by invisible field lines and armed with the motor effect. Use Fleming's left-hand rule to find its weakness and shut it down!
